tagline: The managed HubSpot connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from HubSpot Marketing Hub into Databricks.
what_it_does: The managed HubSpot connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from HubSpot Marketing Hub into Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
